products.name: Connectivity Services
products.description: Network infrastructure and connectivity offerings including WAN, SASE, cloud connect, IoT, voice, and managed network services.

features.name: WAN Services
features.description: MPLS, SD-WAN, and global network backbone services for enterprise wide-area connectivity with SLA-backed performance guarantees and traffic engineering

propositions.is_statement: Managed wide-area network service combining MPLS private backbone and SD-WAN overlay with centralized policy orchestration and application-aware traffic steering across distributed enterprise sites
propositions.does_statement: Connects all enterprise locations with guaranteed bandwidth and sub-50ms latency, enabling real-time ERP and collaboration traffic to flow without congestion or packet loss
propositions.means_statement: Large enterprises consolidate fragmented WAN contracts into a single managed service, cutting network operations overhead while gaining the agility to spin up new sites in days instead of months

features.name: SASE
features.description: Secure Access Service Edge platform converging SD-WAN, cloud-delivered security, and zero-trust network access into a unified edge architecture

propositions.is_statement: Cloud-delivered SASE platform integrating SD-WAN, secure web gateway, CASB, and zero-trust network access into a single policy-driven service edge with global PoP coverage
propositions.does_statement: Enforces consistent security policies for all users regardless of location, replacing multiple point products with a single architecture that reduces policy conflicts and security blind spots
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises enable secure hybrid work at scale without maintaining separate VPN, firewall, and proxy stacks, reducing complexity and accelerating security incident response

features.name: Internet & Cloud Connect
features.description: Dedicated internet access and hyperscaler direct-connect links providing low-latency, high-bandwidth cloud connectivity with private peering

propositions.is_statement: Dedicated internet access and direct-connect links to AWS, Azure, and GCP with private peering, redundant paths, and burstable bandwidth for cloud-first enterprise architectures
propositions.does_statement: Delivers consistent sub-10ms latency to hyperscaler regions with private routing that bypasses public internet, eliminating jitter and packet loss for latency-sensitive cloud workloads
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises run mission-critical SAP, analytics, and AI workloads in the cloud with the same reliability they expect from on-premises infrastructure, removing the last barrier to cloud migration

features.name: 5G & IoT Connectivity
features.description: Private 5G campus networks, M2M connectivity, and IoT sensor network services enabling industrial edge computing and real-time device communication

propositions.is_statement: Private 5G campus network and managed IoT connectivity platform with device onboarding, edge processing, and sensor-to-cloud data pipelines for industrial environments
propositions.does_statement: Connects thousands of sensors and machines on the factory floor with ultra-low latency and guaranteed bandwidth, enabling real-time quality inspection and autonomous material handling
propositions.means_statement: Manufacturers and logistics operators digitize shop-floor operations without relying on shared public spectrum, gaining a dedicated network that scales with production demands

features.name: Voice Services
features.description: Enterprise telephony solutions including SIP trunking, UCaaS voice integration, and managed PBX services for unified business communications

propositions.is_statement: Managed enterprise voice service with SIP trunking, cloud PBX, and Teams/Zoom PSTN integration providing carrier-grade telephony with number portability and call routing
propositions.does_statement: Replaces legacy PBX infrastructure with cloud-native voice that integrates into existing collaboration platforms, maintaining call quality while eliminating hardware refresh cycles
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises reduce telephony costs by consolidating voice onto their collaboration platform, while preserving regulatory call recording and emergency service compliance requirements

features.name: LAN/WLAN Services
features.description: Campus network design, deployment, and management including enterprise WiFi, switching infrastructure, and network access control

propositions.is_statement: Managed campus LAN and enterprise WiFi service with network access control, automated switch provisioning, and AI-driven wireless optimization across multi-site deployments
propositions.does_statement: Delivers seamless wired and wireless connectivity across all campus locations with automated device profiling and policy enforcement, eliminating manual VLAN configuration
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises support growing device density from IoT and BYOD without hiring additional network engineers, keeping campus connectivity reliable as workplace demands evolve

features.name: Network-as-a-Service
features.description: Fully managed network infrastructure delivered as a consumption-based service with on-demand bandwidth scaling and lifecycle management

propositions.is_statement: Network-as-a-Service offering that delivers complete enterprise networking — WAN, LAN, WiFi, and security — as a subscription with consumption-based billing and hardware lifecycle included
propositions.does_statement: Shifts network infrastructure from capital expense to operating expense with predictable monthly costs, on-demand bandwidth scaling, and provider-managed hardware refresh cycles
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises free up IT teams from network operations to focus on business innovation, while converting unpredictable infrastructure spend into a budgetable service line

products.name: Security Services
products.description: Cybersecurity and compliance offerings including SOC/SIEM, identity management, zero trust, cloud security, and regulatory compliance services.

features.name: Security Operations (SOC/SIEM)
features.description: Managed security operations center with 24/7 SIEM monitoring, threat intelligence correlation, automated incident response playbooks, and managed detection and response

propositions.is_statement: Managed security operations center with 24/7 SIEM monitoring, threat intelligence feeds, automated incident response playbooks, and tiered analyst escalation for enterprise environments
propositions.does_statement: Detects and contains security incidents within minutes instead of days, reducing breach impact by correlating alerts across the full attack surface including cloud, endpoint, and network
propositions.means_statement: Large enterprises maintain regulatory compliance and protect brand reputation without building costly in-house SOC teams that require scarce security talent in the DACH market

features.name: Identity & Access Management
features.description: Enterprise IAM platform with privileged access management, single sign-on, multi-factor authentication, and identity governance for hybrid cloud environments

propositions.is_statement: Enterprise identity and access management platform with SSO, MFA, privileged access management, and automated identity lifecycle governance across on-premises and cloud directories
propositions.does_statement: Enforces least-privilege access across all applications and infrastructure, automating joiner-mover-leaver processes that otherwise create orphaned accounts and access creep
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises pass audit requirements with demonstrable access controls while reducing help desk ticket volume from password resets and access requests by up to 60%

features.name: Zero Trust Architecture
features.description: Zero trust implementation services including microsegmentation, continuous verification, and identity-centric access policies for hybrid enterprise environments

propositions.is_statement: Zero trust architecture implementation service with microsegmentation design, continuous device posture verification, and identity-centric access policies for hybrid enterprise networks
propositions.does_statement: Replaces implicit network trust with verified, context-aware access decisions at every resource boundary, containing lateral movement even after initial perimeter compromise
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises meet NIS2 and DORA regulatory requirements for network segmentation while enabling secure access for remote workers and third-party contractors without VPN complexity

features.name: Cloud Security
features.description: Cloud security posture management, cloud workload protection, and security configuration compliance for multi-cloud enterprise environments

propositions.is_statement: Cloud security posture management and workload protection platform with automated misconfiguration detection, container runtime security, and compliance policy enforcement across AWS, Azure, and GCP
propositions.does_statement: Continuously scans cloud environments for security misconfigurations and compliance drift, auto-remediating critical findings before they become exploitable attack vectors
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises adopt multi-cloud strategies with confidence that security policies are consistently enforced, preventing the configuration sprawl that causes most cloud breaches

features.name: Endpoint Security
features.description: Endpoint detection and response, email and web gateway security, and advanced anti-malware protection for enterprise device fleets

propositions.is_statement: Managed endpoint detection and response service with behavioral analysis, email gateway protection, and automated threat containment across the full enterprise device fleet
propositions.does_statement: Isolates compromised endpoints within seconds of detection and provides forensic investigation data, stopping ransomware propagation before it reaches file shares and backup systems
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises protect distributed workforces across office and remote devices without building a dedicated endpoint security team, reducing ransomware exposure across the organization

features.name: Network Security
features.description: Managed firewall, DDoS protection, network segmentation, and intrusion prevention services for enterprise perimeter and internal network defense

propositions.is_statement: Managed network security service with next-generation firewall management, DDoS mitigation, intrusion prevention, and network segmentation across enterprise WAN and data center environments
propositions.does_statement: Blocks malicious traffic at the network perimeter and enforces segmentation policies between zones, preventing lateral movement and reducing the blast radius of any breach
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises maintain defense-in-depth without the operational burden of managing firewall rule sets across hundreds of locations, keeping security posture consistent as the network evolves

features.name: Vulnerability Management
features.description: Continuous vulnerability scanning, patch management, and penetration testing services for proactive risk identification and remediation

propositions.is_statement: Continuous vulnerability scanning and managed patch service with risk-based prioritization, penetration testing, and remediation tracking across infrastructure, applications, and cloud workloads
propositions.does_statement: Identifies and prioritizes vulnerabilities by exploitability and business impact, reducing mean-time-to-patch for critical CVEs from weeks to days through automated deployment workflows
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises maintain a defensible security posture against known exploits without diverting application teams to emergency patching cycles, keeping development velocity intact

features.name: Security Awareness
features.description: Security awareness training programs with phishing simulation, interactive learning modules, and behavioral analytics for enterprise workforce security culture

propositions.is_statement: Security awareness platform with automated phishing simulations, role-based training modules, and behavioral analytics that adapt campaign intensity to individual risk profiles
propositions.does_statement: Reduces successful phishing click rates by training employees with realistic simulations and measuring improvement over time, turning the workforce from attack vector into detection layer
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises address the human factor in cybersecurity systematically, meeting insurance and compliance requirements for security training while measurably reducing social engineering risk

features.name: Compliance & GRC
features.description: Governance, risk, and compliance services including regulatory compliance auditing, risk assessment frameworks, and continuous compliance monitoring

propositions.is_statement: Governance, risk, and compliance service with automated control monitoring, regulatory mapping for NIS2/DORA/GDPR, audit evidence collection, and risk assessment frameworks
propositions.does_statement: Maps regulatory requirements to technical controls and continuously monitors compliance status, generating audit-ready evidence packages without manual spreadsheet collection
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises navigate the growing European regulatory landscape with demonstrable compliance, reducing audit preparation effort and avoiding the penalties that come with non-compliance

features.name: Data Protection & Privacy
features.description: Data loss prevention, encryption management, data classification, and privacy compliance services for GDPR and cross-border data governance

propositions.is_statement: Data protection service with automated data classification, DLP policy enforcement, encryption key management, and privacy impact assessment tooling for GDPR-governed enterprise data
propositions.does_statement: Classifies sensitive data across structured and unstructured repositories, enforcing protection policies that prevent unauthorized exfiltration while enabling legitimate cross-border data flows
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises demonstrate GDPR accountability with automated data governance instead of manual register maintenance, protecting against fines while enabling data-driven business models

products.name: Digital Workplace Services
products.description: End-user computing and collaboration offerings including unified communications, M365 management, device management, VDI, and IT support services.

features.name: Unified Communications
features.description: Enterprise collaboration platform management including Teams, Zoom, voice/video integration, knowledge platforms, and meeting room technology

propositions.is_statement: Managed unified communications service integrating Teams or Zoom with enterprise telephony, meeting room systems, and knowledge-sharing platforms under a single operational umbrella
propositions.does_statement: Unifies voice, video, messaging, and document collaboration into one managed experience, eliminating tool sprawl and ensuring consistent quality across office and remote workspaces
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises enable seamless hybrid collaboration without maintaining separate telephony and video systems, reducing communication friction that slows decision-making across distributed teams

features.name: Modern Workplace / M365
features.description: Microsoft 365 deployment, management, and optimization services including tenant administration, security configuration, and adoption enablement

propositions.is_statement: Managed Microsoft 365 service covering tenant administration, security baseline enforcement, license optimization, and adoption enablement for enterprise-scale M365 deployments
propositions.does_statement: Maximizes M365 value by configuring security baselines, optimizing license allocation, and driving user adoption beyond basic email toward full collaboration and automation capabilities
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises extract full ROI from their Microsoft investment instead of paying for capabilities nobody uses, while ensuring security configurations meet enterprise and regulatory standards

features.name: Device Management
features.description: Unified endpoint management with MDM, BYOD policies, automated device provisioning, and lifecycle management across corporate and personal devices

propositions.is_statement: Unified endpoint management service with zero-touch device provisioning, BYOD container policies, and automated compliance enforcement across Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android fleets
propositions.does_statement: Provisions new devices ready-to-work within hours of shipping, enforcing security policies and deploying applications automatically without IT technician hands-on setup
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises onboard employees faster and support flexible device policies without compromising security, reducing device-related support tickets and new-hire productivity ramp-up time

features.name: Virtual Desktop & DaaS
features.description: Virtual desktop infrastructure and Desktop-as-a-Service platforms providing secure, scalable remote workspace delivery for enterprise workforces

propositions.is_statement: Desktop-as-a-Service platform delivering persistent and non-persistent virtual desktops with GPU acceleration, session management, and data sovereignty on European infrastructure
propositions.does_statement: Provides secure, performant desktop workspaces accessible from any device and location, scaling capacity up or down based on workforce demand without hardware procurement cycles
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises enable contractor and seasonal workforce access without shipping hardware, keeping sensitive data in the data center while supporting flexible work arrangements

features.name: IT Support Services
features.description: Multi-tier service desk, field services, and on-site support with SLA-backed response times and ITSM-integrated ticketing for enterprise IT operations

propositions.is_statement: Multi-tier IT service desk with L1-L3 support, field service dispatch, and ITSM-integrated ticketing providing SLA-backed resolution across all enterprise IT domains
propositions.does_statement: Resolves user issues through a single point of contact with defined escalation paths and SLA tracking, reducing mean-time-to-resolution and eliminating ticket ping-pong between teams
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises maintain workforce productivity without building large internal support teams, ensuring consistent IT service quality across all locations and business units

features.name: Digital Employee Experience
features.description: DEX platforms with real-time endpoint telemetry, productivity analytics, sentiment measurement, and proactive issue resolution for workforce IT satisfaction

propositions.is_statement: Digital employee experience platform collecting real-time endpoint telemetry, application performance metrics, and user sentiment data to proactively identify and resolve IT friction
propositions.does_statement: Detects degraded user experiences before employees report them, triggering automated remediation for common issues like slow boot times, application crashes, and network latency
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises shift IT support from reactive ticket-handling to proactive experience management, improving employee satisfaction and reducing productivity loss from undetected IT issues

features.name: IT Asset Management
features.description: Hardware lifecycle management, IT asset tracking, software license compliance, and print services for enterprise IT inventory governance

propositions.is_statement: IT asset management service with automated inventory discovery, hardware lifecycle tracking, software license compliance monitoring, and certified disposal for enterprise IT estates
propositions.does_statement: Maintains a real-time inventory of all hardware and software assets with lifecycle status, flagging upcoming refresh cycles and license compliance gaps before they become audit findings
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises avoid over-licensing costs and audit penalties while planning hardware refresh budgets accurately, turning reactive asset scrambles into predictable lifecycle management

products.name: Cloud Services
products.description: Cloud infrastructure, migration, and platform offerings including managed hyperscaler, multi-cloud, private cloud, sovereign cloud, and cloud-native services.

features.name: Managed Hyperscaler Services
features.description: Managed services for AWS, Azure, and GCP including architecture review, cost optimization, operational management, and 24/7 cloud operations support

propositions.is_statement: Managed cloud operations for AWS, Azure, and GCP with architecture governance, cost optimization, security baseline enforcement, and 24/7 incident management by certified cloud engineers
propositions.does_statement: Operates enterprise cloud environments with defined SLAs, catching misconfigurations and cost anomalies early while ensuring infrastructure follows well-architected framework best practices
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises run production workloads on hyperscaler platforms with enterprise-grade operations without hiring scarce cloud specialists, keeping cloud spend under control as usage grows

features.name: Multi-Cloud Management
features.description: Cross-cloud orchestration, FinOps cost management, governance policy enforcement, and unified operations across multiple hyperscaler environments

propositions.is_statement: Multi-cloud management platform with unified cost visibility, cross-cloud governance policies, workload placement optimization, and FinOps practices across AWS, Azure, and GCP estates
propositions.does_statement: Provides a single pane of glass for cost, compliance, and operations across all cloud providers, enabling data-driven placement decisions that optimize for cost, latency, or sovereignty
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises avoid vendor lock-in and leverage best-of-breed cloud services while maintaining operational consistency, preventing the cloud sprawl that drives uncontrolled spending

features.name: Private Cloud
features.description: Dedicated private cloud infrastructure with self-service provisioning, resource pooling, and enterprise-grade isolation on dedicated or hosted hardware

propositions.is_statement: Managed private cloud platform on dedicated infrastructure with self-service provisioning portal, automated scaling, and enterprise-grade network isolation in European data centers
propositions.does_statement: Delivers cloud agility and self-service capabilities on infrastructure that is physically and logically isolated, meeting data residency requirements that public cloud alone cannot satisfy
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises modernize IT delivery with cloud operating models while keeping regulated workloads on dedicated infrastructure, satisfying compliance teams without sacrificing developer velocity

features.name: Hybrid Cloud
features.description: Integrated private and public cloud solutions with workload portability, unified management, and consistent networking between on-premises and cloud environments

propositions.is_statement: Hybrid cloud architecture service integrating on-premises, private cloud, and hyperscaler environments with consistent networking, identity, and workload portability across all tiers
propositions.does_statement: Enables workloads to run in the optimal location based on data sensitivity, performance, and cost requirements, with consistent management regardless of where the workload resides
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises pursue cloud-first strategies without a forced all-or-nothing migration, moving workloads at their own pace while maintaining unified operations and security governance

features.name: Cloud Migration Services
features.description: End-to-end cloud migration services including discovery assessment, wave planning, migration execution, and post-migration optimization

propositions.is_statement: End-to-end cloud migration service with automated discovery, dependency mapping, wave planning, and factory-model migration execution for large-scale enterprise workload transitions
propositions.does_statement: Migrates hundreds of workloads to cloud in structured waves with automated testing and rollback capabilities, reducing migration risk and compressing project timelines from years to months
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises exit aging data centers on schedule without business disruption, realizing cloud cost savings and agility benefits faster than in-house migration teams can typically deliver

features.name: Cloud-Native Platform
features.description: Managed Kubernetes, container orchestration, serverless compute, and managed database services for cloud-native application development and deployment

propositions.is_statement: Managed cloud-native platform with Kubernetes orchestration, service mesh, serverless compute, and managed databases providing a production-ready foundation for microservices architectures
propositions.does_statement: Abstracts infrastructure complexity so development teams deploy containerized applications with built-in observability, auto-scaling, and security policies without managing cluster operations
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises accelerate software delivery cycles by giving developers a self-service platform that enforces guardrails, reducing time-to-production while maintaining operational standards

features.name: Sovereign Cloud
features.description: Sovereign cloud infrastructure ensuring data residency, jurisdictional control, and government-grade compliance within European data center boundaries

propositions.is_statement: Sovereign cloud platform with guaranteed data residency in European jurisdictions, operated by EU-based personnel with no foreign government access, meeting BSI C5 and GDPR requirements
propositions.does_statement: Provides hyperscaler-equivalent cloud capabilities with verifiable data sovereignty, ensuring that workloads subject to European regulations remain under European jurisdictional control
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises adopt cloud for regulated workloads like patient data, financial records, and government information without sovereign risk, closing the last compliance gap in cloud strategies

features.name: Enterprise Platforms on Cloud
features.description: SAP, Oracle, and enterprise workload hosting on hyperscaler and private cloud infrastructure with managed operations and performance optimization

propositions.is_statement: Managed hosting and operations for SAP S/4HANA, Oracle, and enterprise ERP workloads on hyperscaler or private cloud with performance tuning, patching, and high-availability management
propositions.does_statement: Runs mission-critical SAP and ERP systems on cloud infrastructure with enterprise SLAs, handling performance optimization, kernel patching, and disaster recovery without in-house basis teams
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises accelerate their SAP S/4HANA transformation by offloading infrastructure operations to specialists, focusing internal teams on business process innovation instead of system administration

products.name: Managed Infrastructure Services
products.description: Data center, compute, storage, and operations offerings including hosting, backup, disaster recovery, monitoring, and infrastructure automation.

features.name: Data Center Services
features.description: Colocation, server housing, and data center facility services with power, cooling, physical security, and connectivity for enterprise IT infrastructure

propositions.is_statement: Data center colocation and housing service with Tier III+ facilities, redundant power and cooling, physical security, and multi-carrier connectivity in European locations
propositions.does_statement: Provides enterprise-grade data center capacity with guaranteed uptime SLAs and physical security, eliminating the capital investment and operational complexity of running owned facilities
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises maintain physical infrastructure presence for latency-sensitive or regulatory workloads without the burden of facility management, freeing capital for digital transformation

features.name: Managed Compute & Storage
features.description: Managed server, SAN, NAS, and virtualization services with capacity planning, performance tuning, and lifecycle management for enterprise compute environments

propositions.is_statement: Managed compute and storage service with server fleet management, SAN/NAS operations, virtualization platform administration, and capacity planning for on-premises and hosted environments
propositions.does_statement: Keeps enterprise compute and storage infrastructure running at optimal performance with proactive capacity management, eliminating unplanned outages from resource exhaustion or hardware failure
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises maintain reliable infrastructure operations without staffing 24/7 server and storage administration teams, converting infrastructure management from a staffing challenge into a service

features.name: Backup & Disaster Recovery
features.description: Enterprise backup operations, disaster recovery planning, automated failover testing, and business continuity services with defined RPO/RTO targets

propositions.is_statement: Managed backup and disaster recovery service with automated backup orchestration, geo-redundant replication, DR runbook testing, and guaranteed RPO/RTO targets for enterprise-critical systems
propositions.does_statement: Ensures data recoverability with tested failover procedures and verified backup integrity, reducing recovery time from days to hours for critical systems during major incidents
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises meet business continuity requirements with proven disaster recovery instead of untested backup assumptions, protecting against the existential risk of prolonged system outages

features.name: Infrastructure Monitoring
features.description: 24/7 network operations center monitoring with automated alerting, performance dashboards, and incident escalation for enterprise infrastructure estates

propositions.is_statement: 24/7 infrastructure monitoring service with NOC-operated alerting, automated incident creation, performance trending dashboards, and defined escalation procedures across all IT layers
propositions.does_statement: Detects infrastructure degradation before it impacts business services, correlating alerts across network, compute, and storage layers to identify root cause instead of flooding teams with symptoms
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises prevent service outages through early detection rather than relying on user complaints, maintaining business service availability while reducing alert fatigue for operations teams

features.name: IT Outsourcing (ITO)
features.description: Full IT operations outsourcing with end-to-end service management, transition planning, and governance frameworks for enterprise IT function delegation

propositions.is_statement: Full IT outsourcing service with structured transition methodology, retained organization design, governance framework, and continuous service improvement for enterprise IT operations
propositions.does_statement: Assumes operational responsibility for defined IT domains with SLA-backed delivery, transforming IT from a cost center with unpredictable staffing needs into a managed service with predictable outcomes
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises refocus internal IT leadership on strategic initiatives by delegating operational delivery, achieving consistent service quality regardless of labor market fluctuations

features.name: Database Administration
features.description: Managed database administration services including performance tuning, high-availability configuration, patching, and capacity management for enterprise database platforms

propositions.is_statement: Managed database administration for Oracle, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, and SAP HANA with performance tuning, high-availability configuration, patching, and capacity management
propositions.does_statement: Maintains database performance and availability through proactive tuning and patching, preventing the slow degradation that leads to application timeouts and data processing backlogs
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises keep business-critical databases performant without retaining expensive DBA specialists, ensuring that database platforms do not become the bottleneck in application delivery

features.name: Infrastructure Automation
features.description: Infrastructure-as-Code, orchestration, self-service provisioning portals, and mainframe/legacy modernization services for enterprise IT automation

propositions.is_statement: Infrastructure automation service with Infrastructure-as-Code implementation, self-service provisioning portals, configuration management, and mainframe integration for hybrid IT estates
propositions.does_statement: Replaces manual provisioning and configuration with repeatable, version-controlled automation that reduces deployment errors and cuts provisioning time from weeks to minutes
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises achieve cloud-like operational speed in on-premises environments, eliminating the manual bottlenecks that make legacy infrastructure slow and error-prone to change

products.name: Application Services
products.description: Software development, integration, and platform offerings including custom development, modernization, enterprise platforms, API management, and AI/analytics.

features.name: Custom Application Development
features.description: Bespoke software development services with agile delivery, UX design, and full-stack engineering for enterprise-specific business applications

propositions.is_statement: Custom application development service with agile delivery squads, UX research, full-stack engineering, and cloud-native architecture for business-specific software that off-the-shelf products cannot address
propositions.does_statement: Builds tailored enterprise applications that precisely fit business processes, delivering working software in iterative sprints with continuous stakeholder feedback and quality assurance
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises gain competitive advantage through differentiated software that automates unique business processes, instead of compromising workflows to fit generic product limitations

features.name: Application Modernization
features.description: Legacy application migration, re-platforming, and re-architecture services transforming monolithic systems into cloud-native, maintainable architectures

propositions.is_statement: Application modernization service with assessment, re-platforming, and re-architecture capabilities that transform legacy monoliths into cloud-native, API-first architectures
propositions.does_statement: Transforms aging applications into maintainable, scalable systems using strangler-fig and domain-driven decomposition patterns, preserving business logic while eliminating technical debt

features.name: Enterprise Platform Services

propositions.does_statement: Implements and optimizes enterprise platforms aligned to business processes, maintaining platform health through proactive monitoring, release management, and continuous improvement cycles

propositions.does_statement: Connects siloed business systems through managed APIs and integration patterns, enabling real-time data flow between ERP, CRM, and operational systems without point-to-point spaghetti

propositions.does_statement: Empowers business teams to build departmental applications and automations themselves within governed guardrails, reducing the IT backlog for simple workflow and data capture applications

propositions.does_statement: Transforms scattered enterprise data into governed, analytics-ready assets and deploys ML models into production with monitoring, retraining pipelines, and bias detection built in

features.name: DevOps & Platform Engineering

propositions.does_statement: Builds golden-path developer workflows with automated testing, security scanning, and deployment pipelines, reducing release cycles from monthly to daily with higher quality and traceability
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises ship software faster without sacrificing governance, giving development teams self-service infrastructure and deployment capabilities within enterprise compliance boundaries

products.name: Consulting Services

features.name: IT Strategy & Architecture
features.description: Technology roadmap development, enterprise architecture assessments, and IT strategy advisory services aligning technology investments with business objectives

propositions.does_statement: Creates a clear technology roadmap that connects IT investments to business outcomes, identifying which initiatives to fund, defer, or retire based on strategic value and technical feasibility

features.name: Digital Transformation
features.description: Business process digitization, change management, and transformation program design for enterprise-wide digital strategy execution

propositions.is_statement: Digital transformation consulting with business process analysis, digitization roadmap design, change management, and transformation program governance for enterprise-wide initiatives
propositions.does_statement: Translates digital strategy into executable programs with clear milestones, stakeholder alignment, and change management that ensures adoption rather than just technology deployment

propositions.is_statement: Industry-specific consulting with vertical expertise in manufacturing, healthcare, public sector, and financial services, plus ESG/sustainability advisory and business process optimization
propositions.does_statement: Brings deep industry knowledge to IT decisions, ensuring that technology solutions fit sector-specific regulations, workflows, and competitive dynamics rather than applying generic templates

features.name: Program & Project Management
features.description: Large-scale IT program delivery management with PMO services, agile coaching, risk management, and multi-workstream coordination for enterprise transformation programs

propositions.is_statement: Program and project management service with PMO setup, multi-workstream coordination, risk management, agile coaching, and governance frameworks for large-scale enterprise IT programs
propositions.does_statement: Delivers complex, multi-vendor IT programs on time and within budget through structured governance, dependency management, and early risk identification across parallel workstreams

features.name: Vendor & Contract Management
features.description: IT procurement advisory, vendor evaluation, contract negotiation, SLA management, and multi-vendor governance for enterprise IT sourcing

propositions.is_statement: Vendor and contract management advisory with IT procurement strategy, vendor evaluation frameworks, contract negotiation support, SLA governance, and multi-vendor coordination for enterprise IT
propositions.does_statement: Optimizes the enterprise vendor portfolio through structured evaluation, benchmark-informed negotiation, and ongoing SLA monitoring that holds suppliers accountable to contracted commitments
propositions.means_statement: Enterprises reduce IT procurement costs and vendor risk through professional sourcing management, ensuring that contract terms protect business interests as technology and requirements evolve

markets.name: Large Enterprise DACH
markets.description: Large enterprises (1000+ employees) in the DACH region requiring comprehensive managed ICT services with European data sovereignty

markets.name: Mid-Market Global
markets.description: Mid-market companies (100-1000 employees) globally requiring scalable ICT services with flexible delivery models

markets.name: Public Sector DACH
markets.description: Government agencies and public institutions in the DACH region requiring sovereign, compliant ICT services with strict data governance
